source_policies.description: Core boundary leak (core-agnostic-source) configured ecosystem term `{term}` appears at line {line} in {classification} context `{context}`
source_policies.suggestion: Move ecosystem-specific behavior into extension metadata/rules, or add an explicit audit allowlist for intentional examples.

source_policies.description: Core boundary leak (detector-agnostic-source) configured ecosystem term `{term}` appears at line {line} in {classification} context `{context}`
source_policies.suggestion: Move ecosystem-specific behavior into extension metadata/rules, or add an explicit audit allowlist for intentional examples.

policies.description: Nested test file `{test_path}` is not wired into the configured test harness
policies.suggestion: Wire `{test_path}` from the covered source module with an explicit path include, or move it to a top-level auto-discovered test path.
